title: 日本ダービーの後に・もはや神業！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her illness, Super Creek races in the
Japanese Derby, where she miraculously pulls
through and nabs first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I explain how I worked hard so that she could win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then praises me with the ultimate
compliment.
